category_sources: source_facts.description says Oxipng is a multithreaded PNG optimizer written in Rust.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is oxipng; source_facts.homepage points to the official oxipng/oxipng repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents Oxipng usage and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies PNG optimization and Rust implementation; source_facts.executables lists the oxipng CLI.
